column1: 2004-07-14‚ÄéHey Everyone... theres another MIT City concert coming up. It's on August 7th at the Degrassi House in Toronto. Admission is $7 and you get a free hotdog
column2: and a great show. Opening for MIT City is a great band called Still Life Still ( urlLink www.stilllifestill.ca ). Doors are @ 7:00
column3: everyone come on out its going to be awesome.  For more information contact me by email ( urlLink spud_monkey29@hotmail.com ) or go to  urlLink www.mit-city.com    P.S. Both MIT City and Still Life Still have MP3's on there websites if you want to check them out!

column1: 2004-07-14‚Äé"MIT City is a Toronto based band
column2: lead by Mike Only. I first heard of them when coming out of the Taking Back Sunday/The Used/Blink concert when someone gave me a ""MIT City Swearing Dictionary"".   After speaking to Mike
column3: and getting a taste of the music
column4: I only got more interested. MIT City likes to interact with its fans on msn and is currently building a fan base. There music is original and they arent afraid to explore with there sound. You can check out some MP3's of there music on there website
column6: or browse through pictures.   Mike is currently booking local shows with MIT City in the GTA. They have an upcoming show on August 7th
column7: so everyone should come and check it out  MIT City
